query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pm_departments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pm_project_notes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `authorId` int NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(),
  CONSTRAINT `pm_project_notes_projectId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `pm_projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `pm_project_notes_authorId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`authorId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pm_note_mentions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `noteId` int NOT NULL,
  `mentionedUserId` int NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `pm_note_mentions_noteId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`noteId`) REFERENCES `pm_project_notes`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `pm_note_mentions_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`mentionedUserId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pm_note_reads` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `noteId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `readAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `markedUnread` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  CONSTRAINT `pm_note_reads_noteId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`noteId`) REFERENCES `pm_project_notes`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `pm_note_reads_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pm_task_comment_reads` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `commentId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `readAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  `markedUnread` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  CONSTRAINT `pm_task_comment_reads_commentId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`commentId`) REFERENCES `pm_task_comments`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `pm_task_comment_reads_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
